name: L10_plugin_skill_inventory
description: Proves the Claude Code plugin (`.claude/plugins/folio-ops/`) was loaded via `--plugin-dir` AND its bundled skill at `skills/inventory-audit/SKILL.md` was discovered and consulted. The prompt 'which books are running low' matches the plugin skill's frontmatter trigger phrasing; the top-level bookstore-assistant skill does not advertise this wording. Triple-bound: (a) `skills_invoked: [inventory-audit]` matches Claude's Skill tool with `args.skill == "inventory-audit"`, (b) the mandated `mcp__folio__search_books` call fired and the reply contains the three seed books with stock<10 (Left Hand of Darkness, Anathem, Pachinko), (c) the plugin-specific marker `[via inventory-audit]` is present, ruling out cross-skill routing.

turns.message: Which books in our catalog are running low? I want a stock audit.

llm_scorer_instruction: Verify the agent (1) routed through the inventory-audit plugin skill rather than bookstore-assistant, (2) called mcp__folio__search_books to retrieve the catalog, (3) listed exactly the three books with stock_qty<10 (Left Hand of Darkness stock=3, Anathem stock=8, Pachinko stock=9), (4) ended the reply with the literal marker [via inventory-audit].
